visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the skeleton. Grid borders for technical look (`border-r border-b border-border/40`). Use 1px solid strokes instead of soft shadows.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimalist. Avoid soft drop-shadows. Use sharp, diffuse ambient shadows (`shadow-sm` or `shadow-[0_4px_16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)]`) for overlays/dialogs only.
visual_enhancers.radius: Subtle roundness (`rounded-md` -> max 6px or 8px) or sharp edges (`rounded-none`). No pill-shapes for main container areas.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for Sticky Headers: `bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5`. No transparent backgrounds over content without blur.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle grain texture on the login background. Minimal interface.
visual_enhancers.motion: Micro-interactions for feedback. Hover state with slight lift (`-translate-y-px`) and border color darkening. No universal transitions (`transition: all` is forbidden). Target specific properties.

layouts.grid_system: High Density Grid (For Dashboards). Mobile: `grid-cols-1`, Tablet: `grid-cols-3`, Desktop: `grid-cols-4`. Gap: Tight (`gap-4` or `gap-6`).
layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. `p-6` or `p-8` for container paddings. Sections: `py-12` or `py-16`.
layouts.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Center align only if it improves hierarchy (e.g. login form), otherwise left-align paragraphs, inputs, tables.

components.buttons: Rectangular with max 4px radius (`rounded-md`). Primary button: `bg-[#2E60CC] text-white hover:bg-[#1F46A1]`. Destructive: `bg-[#E50000] text-white hover:bg-[#B30000]`. Add specific transitions for transform and background-color.
components.cards: Flat background (`bg-white`), 1px subtle border (`border-metallic-DEFAULT`), no shadow by default. On hover: subtle shadow, border color darkens.
components.forms: Use Shadcn `Input`, `Select`, `Checkbox`. Left-aligned labels. Explicit hover and focus states (`focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2E60CC]/50`).
components.tables: Dense, highly structured. `border-collapse`. Alternate row backgrounds (`bg-gray-50/50`). Sortable headers.
components.dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog. Sharp border, subtle backdrop blur for the overlay. Ensure the background isn't purely transparent.

icons.style: Regular or Duotone for active states. Keep sizes moderate (16px to 24px).

images.description: Gray concrete building under blue sky. Use as an immersive background for the split-screen login page to convey industrial strength and scale. Add an overlay (`bg-black/40` or `bg-[#2E60CC]/20`) so text on top remains legible.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Check RealCMB Blue (#2E60CC) against white (it passes, 4.84:1). Check Red (#E50000) against white (it passes, 4.49:1 for large text, adjust to #CC0000 if needed for small text).
accessibility.interactions: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
accessibility.focus: High contrast focus states for all form inputs and buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: You must use Chivo for Headings and IBM Plex Sans for Body. Import these via Google Fonts.
Create the `design_guidelines.json` exact rules inside your Tailwind configuration.
Build the dashboard using the 'Grid Borders / Technical Look' - expose the grid, use 1px metallic borders, minimal shadows.
Implement Internationalization (i18n) for EN/FR right from the start using `react-i18next` or similar.
For electronic signatures, implement a canvas drawing area with an option for text-based signature (using a script font for the text option).
DO NOT apply universal `transition: all`. Target properties specifically.
DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or generic fonts for headings.
NEVER use a purely transparent background for dropdowns or modals - they must have a solid or glass background to remain legible.
All components should use named exports. Pages should use default exports.
For the login page, use the provided industrial background image in a split-screen layout with the login form on the other side.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism (12-24px blur) where appropriate.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. No `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Always use modern UI patterns (sharp edges for this specific industrial project) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, transitions).
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors separate good from extraordinary.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute.
Use named exports for components, default exports for pages.
